prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document is relevant to England because the Capacity Market is part of the government's strategy for electricity supply security specifically in Great Britain, which includes England. The reform proposals are designed to improve the functioning and efficiency of the Capacity Market within this jurisdiction.
